name: Ash & Darrell
description:
Your town is experiencing disappearances on a scale never seen before. But Ash is a hungry trash compactor and Darrell is a grade A enabler with anger issues.

.

Cw: Cannibalism, violence, gore, abuse, codependency, stalking, kidnapping, non/dub con, religious setting, knife play.

.
